'''Endovan''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Sarka sector/Legends|Sarka sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].

==History==
During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]], there was an escaped [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] who offered intel regarding the hiding place for his [[Death/Legends|deceased]] Master's treasures.<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Treasure Hunting|Slave Savings}}</ref>

The [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] had reports that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Rodin Baem]] was sighted on the world.

{{Planet-stub}}
